mapper.select:
select * from warehouse
and warehouse_code like concat('%', #{warehouseCode}, '%')
and warehouse_name like concat('%', #{warehouseName}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into warehouse(warehouse_code, warehouse_name, address, manager, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseName}, #{address}, #{manager}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now())
mapper.update: update warehouse set warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName}, address = #{address}, manager = #{manager}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from warehouse where id in #{id}
